chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-5885 of 2021 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on CMA No.26443/2021. 2. For orders on CMA No.24819/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.10.2021 Mr. Fazal-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the petitioners. ------------------ 1. Urgent application is granted. 2&3. Learned counsel for the petitioners after arguing the petition at some length does not press this petition; however, states that petitioners shall avail alternate remedy available to them for redressal of their grievances. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Abrar
